notes: Design polish landed — dashboard + wizard ported from Claude Design's pass. Light + dark themes. Polished masthead identity card. Smooth volume gauge color climb via new gaugeStroke() interpolating gauge-low → accent-2 → accent-3 across 0-80-100. Framed live panel with breathing dot and motion icon glow tinted per gesture kind. 5-step wizard fully styled — pulser with knob SVG + concentric ripples, dial with sweep arrow, speaker list with clip fix + asymmetric padding, gauge matching the dashboard, done check with draw-on. PROGMEM 82-83%. Updater: first manifest check pulled in from 60s to 10s post-boot, with a 30s fast-retry cap (4x) so a board on a new VLAN can pick up new firmware in under ~2 minutes after PoE link-up even if the first check hits a transient.
